title: vrinda® wooden Mortar and Pestle - 5 inch x 3 inch (Pentacle)
description:
About this item
NATURAL MATERIAL: Crafted from premium-quality wood, our mortar and pestle pentacle offers a traditional and eco-friendly alternative for grinding herbs, spices, and more. This precision ensures you have control over texture, resulting in delicious foods and desserts.
PENTACLE DESIGN: Adorned with a pentacle symbol, this mortar and pestle adds a touch of mystical charm to your kitchen or altar. Embodying a unique design with spiritual significance to invite positive energy.
HANDCRAFTED: Each mortar and pestle is carefully handcrafted from wood, undergoing meticulous attention to detail throughout the crafting process. This dedication ensures that each product is unique and possesses exceptional durability, promising longevity in its use.
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for grinding herbs, spices, grains, and seeds, it's an essential tool for herbalists, witches, and home cooks alike, this mortar and pestle guarantees that all cooking ingredients release their full flavor and aromas.
COMPACT SIZE: Measuring 5 inches in diameter and 3 inches in height, it's compact enough for easy storage yet spacious enough for efficient grinding.
reviews_5s: I have had this over a year, and it's still holding up beautifully.I love this , it's quite large and it looks to be cut allmfrom one continuous piece of wood , hand carved and just beautiful . I love the pentagram on the front !I needed a mortal and pestle for a witch Halloween display. This item is perfect! It's big and rustic looking. The wood and carved star really make it cool! Cheaper but better than the other options out there, for my needs anyway!.It is beautifully made. I cannot say whether or not it works well in use, however, as I purchased this for display purposes only and have no intent to utilize it as a mortar and pestle.I really love it. Its much better in person than the pic. Very earthy. Much larger than i thought which i am happy with.Amazing product, well madeI love it !!! A bit bigger then what I was expecting but all in all well worth every pennyI bought this as a wedding present and i believe my friends are going to love it.It was larger than I expected, which isn’t a problem. It’s beautifully carved and great quality.One of my most favorite purchases in a long time!
reviews_1s: Received on time good quality buetifully made but shipped without pestleOrdered 2 both were moldy when they arrived
